parsed.answer: I am Claude, an AI assistant built by Anthropic. I help users with software engineering tasks: writing, debugging, refactoring, and explaining code; searching and navigating codebases; running shell commands; and coordinating multi-step work. In this project context I also work within a beads task-tracking workflow and have access to specialized metacognition skills for structured reasoning.
